SIGNIFICANT DAMAGE TO WHEAT CROP FROM COMBINATION OF HAIL...WINDS AND HEAVY RAIN. 1/4 TO 1/2 INCH SIZE HAIL REPORTED TO BLANKET THE GROUND TO SEVERAL INCHES IN PLACES WITH LEAVES STRIPPED FROM TREES. WIND GUSTS ESTIMATED 30-40 MPH. 1.25 ICNHES OF PRECIPATION ESTIMATED IN A VERY SHORT PERIOD OF TIME. ROTATION OBSERVED IN LOW CLOUDS WITH NO FUNNEL VISIBLE.
